name: Paramount Global
description: Paramount Skydance Corporation is a leading global media and entertainment company that creates premium content and experiences for audiences worldwide. Through its iconic portfolio of brands—including Paramount Pictures, CBS, MTV, Nickelodeon, and Pluto TV—the company produces and distributes a diverse array of film, television, and digital streaming content. Headquartered in the United States, Paramount operates a comprehensive ecosystem that spans broadcast networks, cable channels, and direct-to-consumer streaming services, delivering news, sports, and entertainment to millions of viewers across the globe while continuing to innovate in the evolving digital media landscape.
